headline: Obi Releases New Data On Tesla Robotaxi Pricing In San Francisco
summary: Tesla's Robotaxi service remains the least expensive ride-hailing option for travelers in San Francisco, but the average price of a ride has risen 41% since December according to new research from Obi, the global real-time aggregator for rideshare prices. Despite the sharp rise, Tesla remains the lowest-priced rideshare option across the market, underscoring its continued role as a disruptive force in autonomous mobility.

headline: Apple's Tim Cook will still be around to help with China
summary: Apple (AAPL) CEO Tim Cook announced on Monday that he plans to step down as chief executive role, effective September 1, and transition to an executive chairman role. Cook will be succeeded by Apple senior vice president of hardware engineering John Ternus. LightShed Partners partner and TMT analyst Walter Piecyk comes on Morning Brief to discuss what this change may mean for Apple's mission and the iPhone maker's relationship with China.

raw.headline: Apple's Tim Cook will still be around to help with China
raw.summary: Apple (AAPL) CEO Tim Cook announced on Monday that he plans to step down as chief executive role, effective September 1, and transition to an executive chairman role. LightShed Partners partner and TMT analyst Walter Piecyk comes on Morning Brief to discuss what this change may mean for Apple's mission and the iPhone maker's relationship with China.
